prompt: Create a realistic premium laptop mockup advertising a luxury villa website. Show exactly 1 open dark-gray MacBook Pro floating horizontally in three-quarter perspective, held from below by exactly 1 human hand against a plain light-gray studio background. The laptop screen should display a full-width French luxury real-estate landing page for VILLA SOLARA. The webpage has a warm off-white top navigation bar with a small gold dash at far left, the brand name in spaced uppercase black letters, and exactly 5 navigation items across the right side: “LA VILLA”, “GALERIE”, “PRESTATIONS”, “LOCALISATION”, and a black rounded “RÉSERVER” button. The screen hero image shows a modern white Mediterranean villa at sunset beside an infinity pool, ocean on the left, palm trees, warm exterior lights, sun loungers on the terrace, and elegant resort atmosphere. Overlay the hero with large centered editorial serif typography reading L’exception comme quotidien, with “L’exception comme” in white and “quotidien” in italic golden yellow. Add tiny coordinate text near the upper-left of the hero image and a small spaced-out subtitle beneath the headline, but keep it subtle and not overly legible. The laptop should have a black bezel with a centered top notch, thin screen, visible lower hinge and ports on the left side, and a small “MacBook Pro” label on the bottom bezel. Lighting is soft and photorealistic, with gentle shadows under the hand and laptop, crisp screen details, premium agency portfolio aesthetic, no extra devices, no watermark, no clutter.
